text:
Once upon a time, in a quaint village surrounded by whispering woods, there lived an enchantingly odd artist. Her kitchen windows always seemed to sparkle with mysterious designs. Nobody knew how. One foggy morning, she decided today was rainy enough.

Paintbrush in hand, she dashed outside. Before her stood an old stump, hollowed mysteriously. Without thinking twice, she hollowed another circle right circle.

That secret corner became her studio. With feathers chalk!

She drew rainbows weaving leaves. They danced.

Stars glittered.

You could see forever sideways.

You saw dreams.

But the strangdest bird flew.

It sang.

A tale. Friends.

Friends went fly.

And flew away.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
